title: micromeria obovata
intro: Micromeria obovata, also known as the Turkish mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria obovata include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions to promote overall well-being.
